Application Received!

Thank you for your interest in joining Strivana. We've received your application and our team is excited to review it.

⏱️ Review Timeline

We review all submissions within 3-5 business days. If your qualifications match our current needs, we'll contact you to schedule an interview.

What happens next?

  • Application review by our recruitment team
  • Skills assessment (if selected)
  • Video interview with our team
  • Reference and background verification
  • Offer and onboarding

Have questions? Email us at careers@strivanallc.com
